title: uhc-buckets
description: Adds custom water and lava bucket textures for clearer UHC gameplay.
body:
The pack recolors buckets based on their contents to eliminate confusion during clutch moments: • Lava buckets glow with bright orange and red • Water buckets shift to clear, vibrant blue This simple visual tweak dramatically reduces misclicks and helps players react faster in PvP, MLG situations, lava traps, and tight UHC fights. The design stays faithful to Minecraft’s style while giving you the clarity you need to stay sharp.

🛡️ Where is this allowed? Because this is a purely visual resource pack with no gameplay advantages, it’s generally allowed on most UHC servers, including:

• mcpvp.club

• Hypixel UHC

• and more![its harder to tell the dif between lava and water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ae2d223a6b3802c43293049597aebe72c9c95f_0.webp)![now its easier to tell the dif between lava and water ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9d8dec38c7bbd7daf1f8f670cae0e0528bdd15_0.webp)
